ddt:Target.Name: FrontCamera2014_ECU_3.0
ddt:Target.Description:
** 26/01/2012 V1 Initialisation de la base DDT de la caméra frontale 15-40 permettant l'alerte sortie de voie (LDW), la commutation automatique code/phare (AHL), DW et OSP. Pilote : Assystem (Y.KADDARA) Sce : 65608 ** 31/08/2012 V.1.2 Finaliser les DID et la création des écrans. Pilote : Assystem (Y.KADDARA) Sce : 65608 ** 27/09/2012 V.1.4 Finaliser les écrans; Supprimer DTC Poor visibility and Voltage too low and Voltage too high Pilote : Assystem (Y.KADDARA) Sce : 65608 ** 03/10/2012 V.1.4 correction des erreurs ODX. Pilote : Assystem (Y.KADDARA) Sce : 65608
** 19/03/2013 V.1.8 correction des erreurs Pilote : Assystem (Y.KADDARA) Sce : 65608
** 22/03/2013 V.1.9 correction des erreurs Pilote : Assystem (Y.KADDARA) Sce : 65608
** 22/03/2013 V.2.0 Ajouter ECU internal temperature dans l'ecran. mise à jour DID 2080 et supprimer DID 2074 Pilote : Assystem (Y.KADDARA) Sce : 65608
** 08/04/2013 V.2.1 Ajouter message d'erreur de la calibration. Pilote : Assystem (Y.KADDARA) Sce : 65608
** 24/06/2013 V.2.2 systemSupplierECUHardwareNumber ($22F192) sur 8 octets Pilote : Assystem (Y.KADDARA) Sce : 65608
** 04/07/2013 V.2.3 Inversion des noms des DID 2071/2072 Pilote : Assystem (Y.KADDARA) Sce : 65608
** 04/10/2013 V.2.4 Ajouter des nombres négatif au Camera position in the vehicle : Y position and X position Ajouter de Windshield type dans l'eran config camera Ajouter des nouveaux messages d'erreur de la calibration Pilote : Assystem (Y.KADDARA) Sce : 65608
** 24/10/2013 V.2.5 Ajouter des nouveaux messages de warnnning de la calibration Pilote : Assystem (Y.KADDARA) Sce : 65608
** 25/11/2013 V.2.6 Ajouter des nouveaux messages de warning de la calibration Applicabilité pour les projets XFD, XFB et XFG Pilote : Assystem (Y.KADDARA) Sce : 65608
** 13/05/2014 V.2.7 Applicabilité pour les projets XFF Correction d'erreurs Pilote : Assystem (Y.KADDARA) Sce : 65608
** 22/08/2014 V.3.0 Ajouter DID OSP NAV SPEED SELECTION et OSP TSR Mode Ajouter une nouvelle page pour JFC Removal DID 0x2059 and 0x2076. Update 0x2068 Pilote : Assystem (Y.KADDARA) Sce : 65608

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: systemSupplierIdentifier
Data.Comment: Name and address information of the supplier.
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier name and address information.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerKitAssemblyPartNumber
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM.

Data.Name: VIN
Data.Comment: Vehicle Identification Number
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the VIN number.

Record data content and format shall be specified by the vehicle manufacturer.

It shall not be erased when the ECU is reprogrammed.

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumber
Data.Comment: Hardware Number
Data.Description:
This value shall be used by reading services to reference the vehicle-manufacturer-specific ECU (server) hardware number.

Record data content and format shall be serverspecific and defined by vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUHardwareNumber
Data.Comment: Hardware Number (Supplier)
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) hardware number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumber
Data.Comment: Software Number (Supplier)
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareVersionNumber
Data.Comment: Software Version (Supplier)
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software version number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: Yaw angle
Data.Comment: for calibration (Value between -4 and 8° with a resolution of 0.0001)

Data.Name: diagnosticVersion
Data.Comment: VDIAG
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the diagnostic version of the ECU.

It is defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Refer to manufacture ECU designer.

Data.Name: SessionName
Data.Comment: Diagnostic session values. See documentation for more information.
Data.Description:
[0x00] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x01] : Default session
[0x02] : Programming session
[0x03] : Extended diagnostic session
[0x04] : Safety system diagnostic session
[0x05 - 0x3F] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x40 - 0x5F] : Vehicle manufacturer specific
[0x60 - 0x7E] : System supplier specific
[0x7F] : ISO / SAE Reserved

Data.Name: DTCCount
Data.Comment: DTC count

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adj. failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or sys. operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: RoutineControlType
Data.Comment: Routine control type - VALUES OTHER THAN 1, 2 & 3 ARE RESERVED AND SHOULD NOT BE USED.

Data.Name: Region
Data.Comment: Value between 0 and 255 with a resolution of 1 (fix coded)

Data.Name: Vehicle width
Data.Comment: Value between 0 and 4000 mm with a resolution of 1

Data.Name: Windshield type
Data.Comment: Value between 0 and 2 with a resolution of 1 (fix coded)

Data.Name: Headlamps type
Data.Comment: Value between 0 and 2 with a resolution of 1

Data.Name: Vehicle type
Data.Comment: Value between 0 and 5 with a resolution of 1

Data.Name: Mode Debugger
Data.Comment: This mode allows you to recover all the results of calculate of the algorithm to make the validation

Data.Name: Pedestrain Present Not Present
Data.Comment: Activation or not of Pedestrain function

Data.Name: Supply voltage
Data.Comment: Value between 6 and 18 with a resolution of 0.1

Data.Name: LDW push button state
Data.Comment: Value between 0 and 1 with a resolution of 1 (fix coded)

Data.Name: LDW Present Not Present
Data.Comment: Activation or not of LDW function

Data.Name: AHL Present Not Present
Data.Comment: Activation or not of AHL function

Data.Name: DW Present Not Present
Data.Comment: Activation or not of DW function.

Data.Name: ECU internal temperature
Data.Comment: Value between -40 and 110 °C with a resolution of 2

Data.Name: Steering wheel angle
Data.Comment: Value between -3276 and 3276 with a resolution of 1

Data.Name: Warning info for calibration
Data.Comment: Reason for failure of the calibration

Item.Text: Left target contrast warning : check the lighting or cleaning the target, if it does not work change targets.
Right target contrast warning : check the lighting or cleaning the target, if it does not work change targets.
Right/Left target contrast warning : check the lighting or cleaning the target, if it does not work change targets.
Left target position warning (too high) : check the position of the target or check the installation of the camera.
Left target position warning (too low) : check the position of the target or check the installation of the camera.
left target position warning high/low :check the position of the target or check the installation of the camera.
Left target position warning (too much left) : check the position of the target or check the installation of the camera.

Left target position warning (too high) and Right target contrast warning and Left target position warning (too much left) : check the position of the target or check the installation of the camera and check the lighting or cleaning the target, if it does not work change targets.
Left target position warning (too much right) : check the position of the target or check the installation of the camera.
Right target position warning (too high) : check the position of the target or check the installation of the camera.
Right target position warning (too low) : check the position of the target or check the installation of the camera.
Left target position warning (too low) and Right target position warning (too low) : check the position of the target or check the installation of the camera.
Right target position warning high/low : check the position of the target or check the installation of the camera.
Right target position warning (too much left) : check the position of the target or check the installation of the camera.
Right target position warning (too much right) : check the position of the target or check the installation of the camera.
Right target position warning left/right : check the position of the target or check the installation of the camera.
Max roll range warning (forward looking clockwise) : check the installation of the camera
Max roll range warning (forward looking counterclockwise) : check the installation of the camera
Max roll range warning clockwise/counterclockwise : check the installation of the camera
Max yaw range warning (top view clockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] (Bit No 12)
Max yaw range warning (top view counterclockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] (Bit No 13)
Max yaw range warning clockwise/counterclockwise : check the installation of the camera
Max pitch range warning (looking too far up) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] (Bit No 14)
Max pitch range warning (looking too far down) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] (Bit No 15)
Max pitchl range warning up/down : check the installation of the camera

Data.Name: X_offset after calibration
Data.Comment: Value between 170 and 190mpix with a resolution of 0.001 (for calibration)

Data.Name: Pitch angle after calibration
Data.Comment: Value between -4 and 8° with a resolution of 0.0001

Data.Name: Pitch angle default value
Data.Comment: Value between -4 and 8° with a resolution of 0.001

Data.Name: Camera position from the ground.Z position
Data.Comment: Value between 0 and 30000mm with a resolution of 1

Data.Name: Distance of target from front axle center
Data.Comment: Value between 0 and 80000 with a resolution of 1

Data.Name: Height of the center of target from the ground
Data.Comment: Value between 0 and 30000 mm with a resolution of 1

Data.Name: LDW activate or not activate
Data.Comment: Enable or disable the LDW function

Data.Name: OSP Speed Limiter HMI
Data.Comment: Enable or disable the display of OSP speed limiter HMI

Item.Text: OSP-Speed Limiter HMI Not activated (SpeedLimiterOSPDisplayRequest forced to 0)

Data.Name: LDW MIN SPEED ACTIV INF
Data.Comment: Value between 0 and 200Km/h with a resolution of 1

Data.Name: LDW MIN SPEED ACTIV SUP
Data.Comment: Value between 0 and 200Km/h with a resolution of 1

Data.Name: LDW MIN RADIUS ACTIV
Data.Comment: Value between 0 and 65535m with a resolution of 1

Data.Name: Roll angle after calibration
Data.Comment: Value between -3 and 3 ° with a resolution of 0.001 (for calibration)

Data.Name: Distance between target logos
Data.Comment: specific parameter for plant setup 65535mm with the resolution of 1

Data.Name: OSP TSR Present Not Present
Data.Comment: Activation or not of OSP function.

Data.Name: Error info for calibration
Data.Comment: Reason for failure of the calibration

Item.Text: Moving camera or target during aiming process : check the installation of the camera and Pass not in front of targets during the calibration
Max roll range exceeded (forward looking clockwise) : check the installation of the camera
Moving camera or target during aiming process and Max roll range exceeded (forward looking clockwise) : check the installation of the camera and Pass not in front of targets during the calibration
Max roll range exceeded (forward looking counterclockwise) : check the installation of the camera

Moving camera or target during aiming process and Max roll range exceeded (forward looking counterclockwise) : check the installation of the camera and Pass not in front of targets during the calibration
Max yaw range exceeded (top view clockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : check the installation of the camera

Moving camera or target during aiming process and Max yaw range exceeded (top view clockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : check the installation of the camera and Pass not in front of targets during the calibration
Max roll range exceeded (forward looking clockwise) and Max yaw range exceeded (top view clockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : check the installation of the camera

Moving camera or target during aiming process and Max roll range exceeded (forward looking clockwise) and Max yaw range exceeded (top view clockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : check the installation of the camera and Pass not in front of targets during the calibration
Max roll range exceeded (forward looking counterclockwise) and Max yaw range exceeded (top view clockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : check the installation of the camera
Moving camera or target during aiming process and Max roll range exceeded (forward looking counterclockwise) and Max yaw range exceeded (top view clockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED]
Max yaw range exceeded (top view counterclockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : check the installation of the camera

Moving camera or target during aiming process and Max yaw range exceeded (top view counterclockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : check the installation of the camera and Pass not in front of targets during the calibration
Max roll range exceeded (forward looking clockwise) and Max yaw range exceeded (top view counterclockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : check the installation of the camera

Moving camera or target during aiming process and Max roll range exceeded (forward looking clockwise) and Max yaw range exceeded (top view counterclockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : check the installation of the camera and Pass not in front of targets during the calibration
Max roll range exceeded (forward looking counterclockwise) and Max yaw range exceeded (top view counterclockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : check the installation of the camera

Moving camera or target during aiming process and Max roll range exceeded (forward looking counterclockwise) and Max yaw range exceeded (top view counterclockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : check the installation of the camera and Pass not in front of targets during the calibration
Max pitch range exceeded (looking too far up) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : check the installation of the camera

Moving camera or target during aiming process and Max pitch range exceeded (looking too far up) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : check the installation of the camera and Pass not in front of targets during the calibration
Max roll range exceeded (forward looking clockwise) and Max pitch range exceeded (looking too far up) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : check the installation of the camera

Moving camera or target during aiming process and Max roll range exceeded (forward looking clockwise) and Max pitch range exceeded (looking too far up) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : check the installation of the camera and Pass not in front of targets during the calibration
Max roll range exceeded (forward looking counterclockwise) and Max pitch range exceeded (looking too far up) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : check the installation of the camera

Moving camera or target during aiming process and Max roll range exceeded (forward looking counterclockwise) and Max pitch range exceeded (looking too far up) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : check the installation of the camera and Pass not in front of targets during the calibration
Max yaw range exceeded (top view clockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] and Max pitch range exceeded (looking too far up) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : check the installation of the camera

Moving camera or target during aiming process and Max yaw range exceeded (top view clockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] and Max pitch range exceeded (looking too far up) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : check the installation of the camera and Pass not in front of targets during the calibration

Max roll range exceeded (forward looking clockwise) and Max yaw range exceeded (top view clockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] and Max pitch range exceeded (looking too far up) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : check the installation of the camera

Moving camera or target during aiming process and Max roll range exceeded (forward looking clockwise) and Max yaw range exceeded (top view clockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] and Max pitch range exceeded (looking too far up) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : check the installation of the camera and Pass not in front of targets during the calibration

Max roll range exceeded (forward looking counterclockwise) and Max yaw range exceeded (top view clockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] and Max pitch range exceeded (looking too far up) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : check the installation of the camera

Moving camera or target during aiming process and Max roll range exceeded (forward looking counterclockwise) and Max yaw range exceeded (top view clockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] and Max pitch range exceeded (looking too far up) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : check the installation of the camera and Pass not in front of targets during the calibration
Max yaw range exceeded (top view counterclockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] and Max pitch range exceeded (looking too far up) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : : check the installation of the camera

Moving camera or target during aiming process and Max yaw range exceeded (top view counterclockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] and Max pitch range exceeded (looking too far up) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : : check the installation of the camera

Max roll range exceeded (forward looking clockwise) and Max yaw range exceeded (top view counterclockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] and Max pitch range exceeded (looking too far up) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : : check the installation of the camera

Moving camera or target during aiming process and Max roll range exceeded (forward looking clockwise) and Max yaw range exceeded (top view counterclockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] and Max pitch range exceeded (looking too far up) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : check the installation of the camera and Pass not in front of targets during the calibration

Max roll range exceeded (forward looking counterclockwise) and Max yaw range exceeded (top view counterclockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] and Max pitch range exceeded (looking too far up) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : check the installation of the camera

Moving camera or target during aiming process and Max roll range exceeded (forward looking counterclockwise) and Max yaw range exceeded (top view counterclockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] and Max pitch range exceeded (looking too far up) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] :: check the installation of the camera and Pass not in front of targets during the calibration
Max pitch range exceeded (looking too far down) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : check the installation of the camera

Moving camera or target during aiming process and Max pitch range exceeded (looking too far down) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : check the installation of the camera and Pass not in front of targets during the calibration
Max roll range exceeded (forward looking clockwise) and Max pitch range exceeded (looking too far down) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : check the installation of the camera

Moving camera or target during aiming process and Max roll range exceeded (forward looking clockwise) and Max pitch range exceeded (looking too far down) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : : check the installation of the camera and Pass not in front of targets during the calibration
Max roll range exceeded (forward looking counterclockwise) and Max pitch range exceeded (looking too far down) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : check the installation of the camera

Moving camera or target during aiming process and Max roll range exceeded (forward looking counterclockwise) Max pitch range exceeded (looking too far down) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : : check the installation of the camera and Pass not in front of targets during the calibration
Max yaw range exceeded (top view clockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] and Max pitch range exceeded (looking too far down) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : check the installation of the camera

Moving camera or target during aiming process and Max yaw range exceeded (top view clockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] and Max pitch range exceeded (looking too far down) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : check the installation of the camera and Pass not in front of targets during the calibration

Max roll range exceeded (forward looking clockwise) and Max yaw range exceeded (top view clockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] Max pitch range exceeded (looking too far down) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : check the installation of the camera

Moving camera or target during aiming process and Max roll range exceeded (forward looking clockwise) and Max yaw range exceeded (top view clockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] and Max pitch range exceeded (looking too far down) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : check the installation of the camera and Pass not in front of targets during the calibration

Max roll range exceeded (forward looking counterclockwise) and Max yaw range exceeded (top view clockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] and Max pitch range exceeded (looking too far down) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : check the installation of the camera

Moving camera or target during aiming process and Max roll range exceeded (forward looking counterclockwise) and Max yaw range exceeded (top view clockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] and Max pitch range exceeded (looking too far down) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : check the installation of the camera and Pass not in front of targets during the calibration
Max yaw range exceeded (top view counterclockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] and Max pitch range exceeded (looking too far down) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : check the installation of the camera

Moving camera or target during aiming process and Max yaw range exceeded (top view counterclockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] and Max pitch range exceeded (looking too far down) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] :: check the installation of the camera and Pass not in front of targets during the calibration

Max roll range exceeded (forward looking clockwise) and Max yaw range exceeded (top view counterclockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] and Max pitch range exceeded (looking too far down) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : check the installation of the camera

Moving camera or target during aiming process and Max roll range exceeded (forward looking clockwise) and Max yaw range exceeded (top view counterclockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] and Max pitch range exceeded (looking too far down) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : check the installation of the camera and Pass not in front of targets during the calibration

Max roll range exceeded (forward looking counterclockwise) and Max yaw range exceeded (top view counterclockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] and Max pitch range exceeded (looking too far down) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : check the installation of the camera

Moving camera or target during aiming process and Max roll range exceeded (forward looking counterclockwise) and Max yaw range exceeded (top view counterclockwise) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] and Max pitch range exceeded (looking too far down) [CURRENTLY UNUSED] : check the installation of the camera and Pass not in front of targets during the calibration
Left target not found : check the position of the target
Right target not found : check the position of the target
Left target is not found and Right target not found : check the position of the target

Data.Name: OSP NAV SPEED SELECTION
Data.Comment: For OSP function : configuration to use or not of "non-verified" speed limits from the navigation

Data.Name: OSP TSR Mode
Data.Comment: For OSP/TSR function : function gives in this DID its current status whether it receives data from n

Data.Name: Presence Of the switch of LDW
Data.Comment: Verify the presence of the switch of LDW function.

Item.Text: The car is not equipped with switch of LDW function
The car is equipped with the switch of LDW function

Data.Name: Tolerance of height from Z
Data.Comment: Value between -256 and 256 mm with a resolution of 2

Data.Name: Camera position in the vehicle.X position
Data.Comment: Value between -32768 mm and 32767 mm with a resolution of 1

Data.Name: Camera position in the vehicle.Y position
Data.Comment: Value between -32768 mm and 32767 mm with a resolution of 1

Data.Name: ECUSerialNumber
Data.Comment: ECU serial number
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the ECU (server) serial number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific.

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Programming
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.ExtendedDiagnostic
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: DataRead.Camera position from the ground.Z position

DataItem.Name: Camera position from the ground.Z position

Request.Name: DataWrite.Camera position from the ground.Z position

DataItem.Name: Camera position from the ground.Z position

Request.Name: DataRead.Distance of target from front axle center

DataItem.Name: Distance of target from front axle center

Request.Name: DataWrite.Distance of target from front axle center

DataItem.Name: Distance of target from front axle center

DataItem.Name: Height of the center of target from the ground

Request.Name: DataWrite.Height of the center of target from the ground

DataItem.Name: Height of the center of target from the ground

Request.Name: RoutineControl
Request.Comment: You should remove ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.xxx data. These are examples.

DataItem.Name: Distance of target from front axle center
Height of the center of target from the ground

DataItem.Name: Camera position in the vehicle.Y position

Request.Name: DataRead.Camera position in the vehicle.Y position

DataItem.Name: Camera position in the vehicle.Y position

DataItem.Name: Presence Of the switch of LDW

DataItem.Name: Presence Of the switch of LDW

Button.Text: Activate or Disable the LDW function
